parsed_output.justification: The only player consistently portrayed as a suspect is Paul.  Multiple remarks — “Paul: So if you did switch ...”, “Paul: I switched you and I switched Justin,” and several statements indicating he might be a werewolf or has operated inconsistently—cast doubt on Paul’s authenticity.  No other player provides clear evidence of a werewolf identity, and Paul’s conflicting statements make him the most likely candidate for the werewolf role.
